name: rubric rule schema validator rejects a rule whose rule_state value is outside warn-only block disabled
command: printf '{"id":"r","name":"r","description":"x","detector":"x","severity":"P1","semver":"1.0.0","rule_state":"made-up"}\n' > rule.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/validate-rule-schema.sh" --rule rule.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_rule_state=made-up' err.txt && grep -q 'allowed=warn-only|block|disabled' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
